title: MK40 4LU, Damm 1876 Ltd: environmental permit issued - EPR/EP3844QU/V005
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Damm 1876 Ltd Installation name: The Eagle Brewery Permit number: EPR/EP3844QU  "
